---
title: "Adding Items To A Content Type"
---

---
title: "Adding Items to a Content Type"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Governance/vfs1758276600164"
section: "Hyland Governance"
---

After creating the property date within the schema, you must add it together with a SysGovernable mixin to a content type.

To add a property to a content type:

1.  Open All projects in Studio Modeler.
2.  Open a Governance project. A project is opened in a Studio Modeler layout.
3.  Expand Content Type located under the Content section on the left panel.
4.  Select a content type. A content type layout is displayed.
5.  Go to the Schemas section.
6.  Click the schema name in the Unselected Items list. The schema is moved to the Selected Items list.
7.  Go to the Mixins section.
8.  Click the SysGovernable mixin in the Unselected Items list. The mixin is moved to the Selected Items list.
9.  Click the Save Content Type icon.   ![Save Content Type icon displayed in the Studio Modeler](data:image/png;base64,)   The selected property is added to the selected content type.
